meaning: n.(尤指紧急情况下或陆上交通断绝时的)空运,空运物资vt.空运
examples: The airlift was conducted in force ten winds.
President Garcia has ordered an airlift of food, medicines and blankets.
The United States is making preparations for a large-scale airlift of 1,200 American citizens.
On a Monday the British Foreign Office asked Air Partner to prepare an airlift.
Without such airlift, the new force may be as powerless as the one it replaces.
